name: webbersites-x402-mcp
description: MCP server for the WebberSites x402 Data API — 45 pay-per-call tools for AI agents: web scraping, document extraction, single-page and whole-site SEO audits, deterministic code lint (Elixir/JavaScript/PHP), crypto prices and L2 order books, brand-kit/logo/site generation, geo, and a wallet-owned Agent Datastore that gives your agent a persistent memory (the paying wallet is the identity). USDC on Base via x402, $0.001-$0.05 per call. Tools are generated from the API's live OpenAPI spec.
